characters.description: The narrator, back for a new school year of journal-keeping. This time his biggest problem lives at home: his older brother Rodrick knows about something embarrassing that happened to Greg over the summer and holds it over him for the whole book.
characters.name: Greg Heffley

characters.description: Greg's teenage older brother and the drummer of the band Loded Diper. He torments Greg constantly and wields an embarrassing summer secret as leverage, though the brothers are briefly drawn together when they share a secret of their own.
characters.name: Rodrick Heffley

characters.description: Greg's loyal, good-natured best friend, whose enthusiasm for things Greg finds babyish continues to embarrass him.
characters.name: Rowley Jefferson

characters.description: Greg's toddler brother, still indulged by their parents and still, in Greg's view, untouchable.
characters.name: Manny Heffley

characters.description: Greg's father, who has little patience for Rodrick's band or his sons' laziness.
characters.name: Frank Heffley

characters.description: Greg's mother, who launches a homemade reward scheme called Mom Bucks to encourage chores and good behaviour, and who wants her sons to get along.
characters.name: Susan Heffley
